results.rendered_html:
bhīru(lu)ka a. [bhī-kru-klukan]
1 Timid, cowardly, timorous.
2 Shy.
3 Afraid.
4 Formidable.
— kaḥ
1 A tiger.
2 A jackal.
3 A bear.
4 An owl.
5 A kind of sugar-cane.
— kaṃ A forest, wood.
